hero.title: Join other coders live solving technical or career
hero.description: Workshops are one of the 4 proven pillars to mastery when learning technical skills, learn more.

sections.title: Watch and interact with real experts as they solve real life challenges
bullets: New techniques to code faster and better.

sections.title: More than one workshop
sections.description:
Studies show that we forget up to 50% of new information within the first hour of learning it.

Within a day, we had forgotten around 70% of the new information, and after a week, we had forgotten about 90%.

sections.title: The most popular topics in the market
sections.subtitle: Subscribe to your favorite technology
sections.description: Data science, React, Python, Profile Building, Interview Preparation, and more subjects will be covered with cool projects in our weekly workshops.

sections.title: Connect with other developers
sections.description: Learning together is fun, connect with hundreds of developers who are on your same level and learning the same technologies.
